metadata.description: Promote v1.3.0 — Quality + Verification + Lean. Adds verified-claims ledger (P1.5 extracts factual claims, user validates in 15 min, blocks ~70-80% of operator hallucinations), Quality Gate #7 (factual claims fact-check vs ledger) + #8 (reader-honesty ≥70% reader-first), output schema split (.md pure content + .meta.yaml metadata), aggressive P3 trim (cut Geo-Plan + Rumelt-Aval default = -25% tokens P3). 2 entry points exposed + 37 internal prompts under anti-fabrication contract.

plugins.name: promote
plugins.description: v1.3.0 BREAKING — Adds Verified Claims Ledger (phase P1.5) to prevent fabrication, Quality Gates #7 (fact-check) + #8 (reader-honesty), output schema split (pure content `.md` + `.meta.yaml`), aggressive P3 trim (cut 09-geo-plan + p3g-rumelt-aval default, replace 10-instrumentation full by 10-tripwires-top3, replace 11-content-calendar-90d by 11-content-calendar-14d-then-outline). 2 skills exposed (promote-strategist + promote-content-batcher) backed by 37 internal prompts under prompts/ (operators: Welsh, McGarry, Lenny, Ferriss, Robinson, Isenberg, Johnson, Indig, Hormozi-shortform, Gerhardt, Faris, Wilcox, Ryan-PMax, Vallaeys, Seufert, Sanchez, Curry; personas: Hormozi, Schwartz, Holiday, Ammar, Paul Graham, X-Mastery, MrBeast, Steve Jobs, Gerhardt; frameworks: JTBD, Dunford, Cialdini, Voss, Four-Fits, PLG, GEO, AI-Content; tactical: customer-research, pricing; utility: claims-extractor, fact-checker, reader-honesty-judge, huashu-nuwa). All 34 internal prompts now bound by `references/anti-fabrication-contract.md`.
